case_title: ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC. VS. LASZLO GASPAR ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 200004506) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT GASPAR, LASZLO AN INDIVIDUAL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $276.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200005542) AS TO DEFENDANT GASPAR, LASZLO AN INDIVIDUAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GASPAR, LASZLO AN INDIVIDUAL $1,827.75 PRINCIPAL, $456.94 ATTORNEY FEES, $276.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.69, SEE SCANNED DOC
